reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, variedad de menú. El hotel es muy bien atendido, los baños están siempre limpios aunque no siempre hay toallas descartables. La playa es grande, buen estacionamiento y limpieza destacable.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and a varied menu. The hotel is very well run, and the bathrooms are always clean, although disposable towels aren't always available. The beach is large, with good parking and outstanding cleanliness.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURobXFyanR3RRAB

reviews.comment:
No tienen mucha variedad en el full. El baño está bien pero no tenían jabón ni toallas para secarse las manos.
Si vas a Brasil es parada necesaria para cargar combustible y cambiar plata.
Agua caliente $20 x 30 segundos de la máquina (suficiente para un termo de litro)

(Translated by Google)
They don't have much variety at the full service station. The bathroom is fine, but they didn't have soap or hand towels. If you're going to Brazil, it's a necessary stop to refuel and exchange money. Hot water costs $20 for 30 seconds at the machine (enough for a liter thermos).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoc3NEYm5nRRAB
